title: M1 Invite + Claim same finalize run

semantics.invite_priority: Org invite RPC before claim RPC when both tokens exist
semantics.same_run_claim: After successful invite, claim runs in same finalize invocation
semantics.reload: One onSuccessReloadProfile after invite-success chain (including deferred claim)
semantics.routing: resolveInviteAndClaimTokensForRouting unchanged for gate UI precedence
